abilities.name: Incorporeal
abilities.text: Reduce damage dealt to this model by 1. Damage from (magic) actions may not be reduced this way.

abilities.name: Uneasy Waves
abilities.text: Enemy models with a Staggered token within 6" of this model cannot declare the Interact action.

actions.name: Stygian Hook
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target has a friendly upgrade attached, this model receives +(heart) to its final duel total.

triggers.name: Erase Their Legacy
triggers.text: Remove all enemy Scheme markers within (pulse)2" of the target.

triggers.name: You're Comin' With Me
triggers.text: Move the target up to 3", then place this model into base contact with it.

triggers.name: Weigh Down
triggers.text: Target must have a friendly upgrade attached. When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

actions.name: The Toll
actions.effects: Move the target up to 3" and it gains a Staggered token.

triggers.name: Screams of the Lost
triggers.text: Once per turn. Summon a Drowned in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Turbulent Waters
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Ally only. Target heals 2 and gains an Aura (Hazardous) token.

triggers.name: The Silver Whistle
triggers.text: Target declares a general action chosen and controlled by this model.
